sections.biography-collaborative-works: His father was Xun Shu (Jihe), the Prefect of Langling. Xun Gun approved the marriage of Tang Heng’s daughter, Fu Gong Ming of Ru Nan, to his son, Xun Yu, when the later was only two years of age. Xun Yu was ridiculed by others for this (SGZ PSZ: Xun Yu). Died at age sixty-six.

full_text:
Xun Gun (Zhongci) 荀緄 (仲慈)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Gun (荀緄), styledZhongci (仲慈). Son of Xun Shu, father of Xun Yu. One of the ‘Eight Dragons’. Xun Gun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:10
BiographyCollaborative Works
His father was Xun Shu (Jihe), the Prefect of Langling. Xun Gun approved the marriage of Tang Heng’s daughter, Fu Gong Ming of Ru Nan, to his son, Xun Yu, when the later was only two years of age. Xun Yu was ridiculed by others for this (SGZ PSZ: Xun Yu). Died at age sixty-six.
